name: Wellness Experts Grid
prompt_context: A section introducing the professionals behind the wellness platform. Features profile images, names, and specialties in a clean grid. The tone is professional and reassuring.

content_schema.h2: string (Section title, e.g. 'People behind the Healing Path')
content_schema.description: string (Short intro about the team, max 20 words)

image_hints: Select professional headshots of people with warm, friendly expressions. Natural lighting, clean backgrounds.
